resources.name: Herya App API
resources.description: Herya App — Vinyasa Krama Practice Backend API v1

resources.name: Health & Diagnostics
resources.description: Server status and error-scenario tests — run these first to verify the server is up

resources.name: Health check — GET /
resources.description: Expected 200 — { message, status: 'Server is running', version, endpoints }

resources.name: Route not found — 404
resources.description: Expected 404 — { success: false, message: 'Route Not Found' }

resources.name: No token — 401
resources.description: Expected 401 — request to a protected route with no Authorization header.

resources.name: Invalid token — 401
resources.description: Expected 401 — malformed or expired JWT.

resources.name: Insufficient role — 403
resources.description: Expected 403 — valid user token used on an admin-only route.

resources.name: Invalid ObjectId — 400
resources.description: Expected 400 — non-hex string passed as MongoDB ObjectId.

resources.name: Authentication
resources.description: Public — no token required

resources.name: Register
Login
resources.description: Copy the returned token into the {{ token }} environment variable.

resources.name: Forgot password
resources.description: Requests a password reset email. locale: es | en

resources.name: Reset password
resources.description: Requires a valid reset token from the password reset flow.

resources.name: Current auth user
resources.description: Returns the currently authenticated user.

resources.name: Logout
resources.description: Protected route. Useful for testing logout response semantics.

resources.name: Poses
resources.description: Public — no authentication required

resources.name: Get all poses
resources.description:
Filtered, paginated list.
category enum: standing_mountain | standing_asymmetric | standing_symmetric | one_leg_balance | seated_forward | seated_twist | seated_hip_opener | supine | prone | inverted | arm_support | backbend | meditative
sidedness: symmetric | left_only | right_only | both_sides

resources.name: Search poses
resources.description: Full-text search across name, romanization, IAST, Sanskrit, aliases, tags.

resources.name: Get poses by category
resources.description: Returns poses sorted by difficulty then name.

resources.name: Get poses by VK family
resources.description:
Returns poses grouped by role: primary | transition | counterpose | preparation
VK families: tadasana | standing_asymmetric | standing_symmetric | one_leg_standing | seated | supine | prone | inverted | meditative | bow_sequence | triangle_sequence | sun_salutation | vajrasana_variations | lotus_variations

resources.name: Get pose by ID
resources.description: Full pose details with all relationships populated.

resources.name: Get related poses
resources.description: Returns: { basePose, preparatoryPoses, followUpPoses, counterposes }

resources.name: Breathing Patterns
resources.description: Public — no authentication required

resources.name: Get all breathing patterns
resources.description:
energyEffect: calming | energizing | balancing | cooling | heating
practicePhase: opening | mid_practice | closing | anytime

resources.name: Search breathing patterns
resources.description: Full-text search across name, description and tags (min 2 chars).

resources.name: Get recommended pattern
resources.description:
goal enum: calm | energize | focus | balance | cool | heat
timeOfDay: morning | afternoon | evening | night
userLevel: beginner | intermediate | advanced

resources.name: Get pranayama progression
resources.description: Returns patterns organised by learning level: level1_beginner, level2_intermediate, level3_advanced.

resources.name: Get patterns by technique
resources.description: technique enum: nadishodhana | kapalabhati | bhastrika | ujjayi | bhramari | cooling

resources.name: Get pattern by ID
resources.description: Full pattern details with prerequisites populated.

resources.name: Sequences
resources.description: Mostly public. /stats/recommended requires Bearer token.

resources.name: Get all sequences
resources.description:
family enum: tadasana | standing_asymmetric | standing_symmetric | one_leg_standing | seated | supine | prone | inverted | meditative | bow_sequence | triangle_sequence | sun_salutation | vajrasana_variations | lotus_variations
level: 1 | 2 | 3

resources.name: Get recommended sequence (auth)
resources.description: Returns next recommended VK sequence based on user's progression. Requires Bearer token.

resources.name: Get sequence by ID
resources.description: Full sequence with all poses and annotations populated.

resources.name: Users
resources.description: All routes require Bearer token

resources.name: Update my profile
resources.description:
JSON body. Profile image is handled separately at PUT /users/me/image.
practiceIntensity: gentle | moderate | vigorous
timeOfDay: morning | afternoon | evening | anytime
language: en | es
theme: light | dark

resources.name: Get my stats
resources.description: Returns: totalSessions, totalMinutes, currentStreak, sessionsPerWeek (last 4 weeks), mostPracticedFamilies, avgDuration, vkProgression.

resources.name: Update my profile image
resources.description: Uploads and replaces the current profile image.

resources.name: Delete my profile image
resources.description: Removes the current profile image if one exists.

resources.name: Delete my account
resources.description: WARNING: Permanently deletes account and all associated data.

resources.name: Sessions
resources.description: All routes require Bearer token

resources.name: Get session stats
resources.description: Returns: totalSessions, totalMinutes, currentStreak, sessionsByType, sessionsPerWeek, mostPracticedFamilies, avgDuration.

resources.name: Get my sessions
resources.description: sessionType: vk_sequence | pranayama | meditation | complete_practice

resources.name: Create session — VK Sequence
resources.description:
vkSequence (ObjectId) is required when sessionType is vk_sequence.
vkFeedback.sequenceChallenge: too_easy | appropriate | too_challenging
vkFeedback.vinyasaPace: too_slow | perfect | too_fast
vkFeedback.breathComfort: comfortable | slightly_strained | very_difficult

resources.name: Create session — Complete practice
resources.description: completePractice.mainSequences is required (array, min 1 element) when sessionType is complete_practice.

resources.name: Get active session
resources.description: Returns the current active guided session, if any.

resources.name: Practice analytics
resources.description: Returns practice analytics for the authenticated user.

resources.name: Tutor analytics
resources.description: Tutor-oriented analytics endpoint.

resources.name: Start guided session
resources.description: Starts a guided practice session flow.

resources.name: Pause guided session
resources.description: Pauses a guided practice session.

resources.name: Advance guided block
resources.description: Advances the current guided practice block.

resources.name: Complete guided session
resources.description: Marks a guided session as completed.

resources.name: Abandon guided session
resources.description: Abandons the current guided session.

resources.name: Journal Entries
resources.description: All routes require Bearer token

resources.name: Get my journal entries
resources.description: sortBy: date | mood | energy

resources.name: Create journal entry
resources.description:
One journal per session (unique constraint).
moodBefore enum: calm | anxious | energized | tired | focused | stressed | happy | sad | grounded | restless | peaceful | overwhelmed | motivated | discouraged | scattered | irritated
moodAfter additionally: renewed | centered | light | clear
difficultyFeedback: too_easy | just_right | too_hard
pacingFeedback: too_slow | perfect | too_fast

resources.name: Update journal entry
resources.description: All fields optional. Media uploads are additive (new files are appended to existing).

resources.name: Delete journal entry
resources.description: Deletes entry and all associated Cloudinary media (photos + voice notes).

resources.name: Child Profiles
resources.description: Authenticated routes. Creation is tutor-only; reads and updates are scoped to the owning tutor.

resources.name: Get child profiles
resources.description: Returns active child profiles for the authenticated tutor.

resources.name: Create child profile
resources.description: Tutor-only endpoint. age must be between 3 and 18.

resources.name: Update child profile
resources.description: Updates only allowed child profile fields for the owning tutor.

resources.name: Archive child profile
resources.description: Soft-delete: sets active to false.

resources.name: Session Templates
resources.description: Authenticated routes for reusable practice templates.

resources.name: Get session templates
resources.description: Returns the authenticated user's templates. Optional childProfile filter.

resources.name: Create session template
resources.description: preset: adult | tutor. childProfile may also be included for tutor-specific templates.

resources.name: Record template use
resources.description: Increments usageCount and updates lastUsedAt.

resources.name: Admin
resources.description: All routes require Bearer token with admin role — use {{ admin_token }}

resources.name: Get all users
resources.description: role: user | tutor | admin

resources.name: Update user role
resources.description: role enum: user | tutor | admin

resources.name: Delete user
resources.description: WARNING: Cascade delete — removes sessions, journal entries and Cloudinary media.

resources.name: Create VK sequence
resources.description:
Aligned with current admin validations: sanskritName, englishName, family and level are required.
family enum: tadasana | standing_asymmetric | standing_symmetric | one_leg_standing | seated | supine | prone | inverted | meditative | bow_sequence | triangle_sequence | sun_salutation | vajrasana_variations | lotus_variations
level: 1 | 2 | 3

resources.name: Delete VK sequence
resources.description: Cannot delete if sequence is referenced in active sessions.

resources.name: Create pose

params.name: description
params.value: Root pose of the standing mountain family

resources.description: difficulty: beginner | intermediate | advanced

resources.name: Delete pose
resources.description: Cannot delete if pose is referenced in sequences.

resources.name: Create breathing pattern

body.text:
{
  "romanizationName": "Nadi Shodhana Pranayama",
  "iastName": "Nāḍī Śodhana Prāṇāyāma",
  "sanskritName": "नाडी शोधन प्राणायाम",
  "description": "Alternate nostril breathing — balancing pranayama",
  "difficulty": "beginner",
  "energyEffect": "balancing",
  "technique": "nadishodhana",
  "practicePhase": "closing",
  "recommendedDurationMinutes": { "min": 5, "max": 15 },
  "pattern": {
    "inhale": 4,
    "hold": 4,
    "exhale": 8,
    "holdOut": 0
  }
}

resources.description:
technique: nadishodhana | kapalabhati | bhastrika | ujjayi | bhramari | cooling
energyEffect: calming | energizing | balancing | cooling | heating
practicePhase: opening | mid_practice | closing | anytime

resources.name: Delete breathing pattern
resources.description: Cannot delete if pattern is referenced in sessions.

resources.name: Dashboard stats
resources.description: Returns: totalUsers, activeSessions, popularSequences, sessionTrends.

resources.name: User analytics
resources.description: Returns: user, totalSessions, journalEntries, vkProgression.
